raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "imperative guidance instructing the addressee on habitual mental focus and ethical alignment",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the universe possesses an identifiable nature",
    "the individual is a part of that universe with a corresponding particular nature",
    "understanding the part-whole relation is necessary for proper action",
    "external hindrance to acting and speaking in accordance with that nature is impossible",
    "agreement between personal conduct and cosmic nature is always attainable"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent: the three listed objects of attention form a logical progression from cosmic whole to personal part to unimpeded ethical expression",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "a metaphysics in which the universe has a normative nature, the addressee can reliably discern that nature, and alignment with it constitutes human flourishing",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the universe lacks any prescriptive nature, external constraints on speech and action routinely exist, or the part-whole relation does not entail normative guidance for conduct"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: imperative guidance instructing the addressee on habitual mental focus and ethical alignment
implicit_claims: the universe possesses an identifiable nature
the individual is a part of that universe with a corresponding particular nature
understanding the part-whole relation is necessary for proper action
external hindrance to acting and speaking in accordance with that nature is impossible
agreement between personal conduct and cosmic nature is always attainable

parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: a metaphysics in which the universe has a normative nature, the addressee can reliably discern that nature, and alignment with it constitutes human flourishing
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: the universe lacks any prescriptive nature, external constraints on speech and action routinely exist, or the part-whole relation does not entail normative guidance for conduct
